---
name: Tech Debt / Refactor
about: Track technical debt or refactoring needs
title: '[DEBT]: '
labels: 'technical debt, refactoring'
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Brief description of the technical debt item.

## Current State
What's the problem with the current code?

## Proposed Solution
How should this be refactored?

## Impact
- **Maintenance**: How does this affect maintenance?
- **Performance**: Are there performance implications?
- **Developer Experience**: How does this affect DX?

## Scope
- Files affected: [list]
- Estimated effort: [hours/days]

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (should address soon)
- [ ] Medium (address when convenient)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Additional Context
Any other context.

---

**Workflow**: Identify → Document → Schedule → Refactor → Test → Merge
